entry.title: New: RES25-330 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ONE (1) HI-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCH VALUED AT $3,274.51 TO THE CITY FROM BRADLEY NAKAMURA FOR PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ “DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF BJ & BRAEDE NAKAMURA” TO BE PLACED AT PUʻULOA BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
